title: Drive visible peers through fresh lifecycle
invariant: A peer is a visible interactive CLI; prompts are submitted only after inspection and completion is fresh lifecycle truth when instrumentation exists.
sharedInstruction: Reuse one visible interactive peer, inspect its composer before sending, mark it running, and accept completion only from a newer ready lifecycle generation; use output or idle only for uninstrumented fallback.

claude: The peer skill owns when and which peer to select.
pi: The peer skill still owns selection, roles, and engagement policy.
